title: Corylopasania nhatrangensis
intro: Corydalis nhatrangensis, commonly known as Nhatrang Corydalis, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Papaveraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antibacterial effects, providing relief from pain, fever, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Corydalis nhatrangensis include alkaloids such as tetrahydropalmatine, tetrahydroberberine, and protopine, as well as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Corydalis nhatrangensis is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into various folk remedies and traditional formulas.
